comment: Exact pre-renewal mastery bonuses from battle.c:battle_addmastery (weapon-type switch + KN_SPEARMASTERY conditionals). No renewal content. Each mastery can have 'default' and optional conditional keys (riding_peco, riding_dragon).

AL_DEMONBANE.note: conditional mastery — handled in phase 1 of mastery_fix.py (_vanilla_secondary_bonus)

HT_BEASTBANE.note: conditional mastery — handled in phase 1 of mastery_fix.py (_vanilla_secondary_bonus)
